# SentinelMatch API Documentation
Base URL: https://api.sentinelmatch.local
Usage: This API performs real-time identity verification using Siamese ResNet-18 embeddings.

Endpoints:
- POST /verify: Accepts an image file, extracts embedding, queries Vector DB for match.
- GET /health: Returns system status.

Guidelines:
- Always use multipart/form-data for image uploads.
- Confidence thresholds are managed server-side.
